preferredExpressions.盐雾测试: salt spray test (per ISO 9227, not 'salt fog test')

en.tonePreference: Professional, direct, conversational. Use 'you'/'we'. Avoid passive voice in CTAs. Data statements should be factual: 'tested to 480h salt spray' not 'has undergone 480-hour salt spray testing'.

preferredExpressions.冷缩: холодная усадка (always hyphenated in compound: холодноусадочный)
preferredExpressions.槽式桥架: кабельный лоток со сплошным дном / лоток сплошного дна

commonMistakes.correct: ПС XX (подстанция) — Russian convention puts abbreviation before name

commonMistakes.wrong: ток короткого замыкания (full form every time)
commonMistakes.correct: ток КЗ (abbreviated after first use, standard in Russian electrical)

ru.tonePreference: Formal technical register. Use «» for quotes. Always use non-breaking space before %. Thousand separator: space (1 000), decimal: comma (1,5). Dates: DD.MM.YYYY. Russian electrical engineering has its own ГОСТ terminology—prefer ГОСТ terms over literal translation.

preferredExpressions.热镀锌: feuerverzinkt (not 'heißverzinkt' — Feuer- is the technical prefix)

de.tonePreference: Formal business German. Use Sie. Compound nouns preferred.

preferredExpressions.放热焊接: لحام طارد للحرارة (طارد = exothermic, standard term)

commonMistakes.correct: احصل على عرض سعر (عرض = offer/quotation, not just price)
نقل القدرة / نقل الطاقة (power transmission, not electricity)

ar.tonePreference: Formal business Arabic. Numbers in Eastern Arabic (١٢٣) for body text, Western (123) for technical specs. RTL layout note: in HTML/CMS contexts, ensure dir='rtl' is set on Arabic content containers. Dates: DD/MM/YYYY.

preferredExpressions.握力: fuerza de agarre / agarre (context-dependent, not 'fuerza de sujeción')
preferredExpressions.储能: almacenamiento de energía / ESS (keep English acronym)
preferredExpressions.槽式桥架: bandeja portacables de fondo ciego / bandeja de fondo ciego

commonMistakes.correct: fallo / avería (for equipment); accidente (for safety events)

es.tonePreference: Formal Usted form for all business communication. Industrial B2B register. Technical precision over literary elegance.

fr.tonePreference: Use non-breaking space before : ; ! ? %. «» for quotes with non-breaking spaces.

pt.tonePreference: Use Brazilian variant (você, not tu). Formal business register.

vi.tonePreference: Full diacritics mandatory. No word separation issues.

th.tonePreference: Respect word boundaries even without spaces — use zero-width spaces if needed between clauses.

id.tonePreference: Formal but not stiff. Anda form acceptable in business context.
